creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
print/acroread9 is vulnerable.
	ref: http://www.adobe.com/support/security/bulletins/apsb12-08.html

Fix: 

fixed version (9.5.1) is available only for English, like current version.
	for other language, especially for Japanese, additional language pack
	helps displaying PDF file containing Japanese.
	I think it is better to use them for other language.
